gui.craftics.level_select.title: Level Select
key.craftics.move_slot_left: Move Item: Shift Locked Slot Left
key.craftics.move_slot_right: Move Item: Shift Locked Slot Right
text.config.craftics-config.title: Craftics
text.config.craftics-config.option.baseA: Starting action points each player has per turn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.baseS: Starting movement speed (tiles) each player has per turn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.playe: Global multiplier for all damage the player deals. 1.0 = normal.
text.config.craftics-config.option.enemy: Global multiplier for all enemy damage dealt to the player. 1.0 = normal.
Global multiplier for all enemy HP (regular mobs). 1.0 = normal.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hpPer: HP bonus added per biome in the progression path. Higher = steeper health curve.
text.config.craftics-config.option.scale: Whether enemies gain +hpPerLevel HP for each level within a biome.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hpPer: HP bonus per level within a biome (if scaleHpPerLevel is true).
text.config.craftics-config.option.atkPe: Attack bonus divisor per biome. Lower = faster attack scaling.
text.config.craftics-config.option.defPe: Defense bonus divisor per biome. Lower = faster defense scaling.
text.config.craftics-config.option.bossH: HP multiplier applied only to bosses (does not stack with enemyHpMultiplier).
text.config.craftics-config.option.frien: Whether players and allies can damage each other.
text.config.craftics-config.option.perma: Whether death is permanent with no respawn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hunge: Whether the vanilla hunger mechanic is active.
text.config.craftics-config.option.healB: Whether players are healed when advancing between levels.
text.config.craftics-config.option.maxEn: Maximum number of enemies spawned in a single level.
text.config.craftics-config.option.maxBo: Maximum number of additional minions a boss can summon.
text.config.craftics-config.option.attac: Action points required to perform an attack.
text.config.craftics-config.option.knock: Number of tiles a target is pushed back on knockback.
text.config.craftics-config.option.criti: Probability (0.0-1.0) that an attack lands a critical hit.
text.config.craftics-config.option.range: Probability (0.0-1.0) that a ranged attack hits its target.
text.config.craftics-config.option.poiso: Damage dealt by poison each turn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.maxCo: Maximum number of turns a combat effect can last.
text.config.craftics-config.option.enemy: Multiplier on enemy movement speed. 1.0 = normal.
text.config.craftics-config.option.beeSw: Whether bee swarms replace passive mobs in spawns.
text.config.craftics-config.option.passi: Probability (0.0-1.0) that a passive mob wanders each turn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.preda: Whether predator mobs actively hunt prey.
text.config.craftics-config.option.passi: Ratio (0.0-1.0) of passive mobs that turn hostile in early biomes.
Ratio (0.0-1.0) of passive mobs that turn hostile in late biomes.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgFi: Base damage dealt with bare fists.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgWo: Base damage dealt with a wooden sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgSt: Base damage dealt with a stone sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgIr: Base damage dealt with an iron sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgDi: Base damage dealt with a diamond sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgNe: Base damage dealt with a netherite sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgGo: Base damage dealt with a golden sword.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgWo: Base damage dealt with a wooden axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgSt: Base damage dealt with a stone axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgIr: Base damage dealt with an iron axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgDi: Base damage dealt with a diamond axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgNe: Base damage dealt with a netherite axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgGo: Base damage dealt with a golden axe.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgMa: Base damage dealt with a mace.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgTr: Base damage dealt with a trident.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgBo: Base damage dealt with a bow.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgCr: Base damage dealt with a crossbow.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgSt: Base damage dealt with a stick.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgBl: Base damage dealt with a blaze rod.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgBr: Base damage dealt with a breeze rod.
text.config.craftics-config.option.dmgCo: Base damage dealt with a tube coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a brain coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a bubble coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a fire coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a horn coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a dead coral weapon (Water-type melee).
Base damage dealt with a coral fan weapon (Water-type melee).
text.config.craftics-config.option.arena: Extra padding tiles added around the arena grid.
text.config.craftics-config.option.lootQ: Multiplier on the quantity of loot dropped. 1.0 = normal.
text.config.craftics-config.option.emera: Base number of emeralds awarded for a victory.
text.config.craftics-config.option.goatH: Probability (0.0-1.0) of a goat horn dropping.
text.config.craftics-config.option.trimD: Probability (0.0-1.0) of an armor trim dropping.
text.config.craftics-config.option.potte: Probability (0.0-1.0) of a pottery sherd dropping.
text.config.craftics-config.option.early: Chance of any event in early biomes (0-2). Set to 0 to disable events early.
text.config.craftics-config.option.omino: Ominous Trial Chamber (late game only, biome 10+).
text.config.craftics-config.option.maxPa: Maximum number of members allowed in a party.
text.config.craftics-config.option.ngPlu: Additional difficulty scaling applied per New Game Plus cycle.
text.config.craftics-config.option.skipE: Whether enemy turn animations are skipped.
text.config.craftics-config.option.enemy: Delay (ticks) between enemy actions during their turn.
text.config.craftics-config.option.cinem: Slow enemy/ally turns so the camera follows each acting unit, then returns to your framing when your turn starts.
text.config.craftics-config.option.autoE: Whether the turn ends automatically when no actions remain.
text.config.craftics-config.option.showE: Whether enemy attack range hints are displayed.
Whether enemy planned actions (intentions) are displayed.
text.config.craftics-config.option.comba: Maximum number of lines shown in the combat log.
text.config.craftics-config.option.compa: Whether the enemy list is shown in a compact layout.
text.config.craftics-config.option.showE: Whether the emerald count is shown during combat.
text.config.craftics-config.option.fadeT: Whether the turn banner fades out instead of disappearing instantly.
text.config.craftics-config.option.showD: Whether floating damage numbers are displayed.
text.config.craftics-config.option.bossG: Whether bosses are rendered with a glowing outline.
text.config.craftics-config.option.death: Whether defeated entities play a shrink animation on death.
text.config.craftics-config.option.scree: Whether the screen shakes when a hit lands.
text.config.craftics-config.option.vfxBl: Whether block-entity based visual effects are enabled.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hitPa: Whether a brief pause plays on impactful hits.
text.config.craftics-config.option.vfxIn: Overall intensity multiplier for visual effects. 1.0 = normal.
text.config.craftics-config.option.large: Whether UI elements are rendered at a larger size.
text.config.craftics-config.option.disab: Whether all camera shake effects are disabled.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hints: Master toggle for all in-game UX hints.
text.config.craftics-config.option.hintI: Multiplier on every hint's idle threshold (0.5 = hints fire twice as fast, 2.0 = half as fast).
